meta.title: Why Strapi?
meta.excerpt: A comprehensive business case for Strapi CMS - cost analysis, technical benefits, security features, and real-world use cases.

seo.metaTitle: Why Strapi? Business Case & ROI Analysis
seo.metaDescription: Complete business case for Strapi CMS including 60% cost reduction vs custom builds, security features, and 3-year TCO comparison with alternatives.

blocks.content: Strapi delivers measurable business value through cost reduction, faster time-to-market, and improved team productivity. Here are the key metrics from our implementation:

blocks.title: Real Cost Savings
blocks.content: Compared to building a custom CMS from scratch, Strapi saved us $64,800 in development costs over 3 years (72% reduction) while delivering enterprise-grade features out of the box.
We analyzed the complete 3-year TCO including development, hosting, maintenance, and licensing costs across three options:

blocks.title: Cost Comparison Summary
blocks.content:
**Strapi (Self-Hosted): $24,600**
- Initial Development: $15,000
- Annual Hosting: $1,200/yr ($3,600 total)
- Annual Maintenance: $2,000/yr ($6,000 total)
- No licensing fees

**Custom Backend: $89,400**
- Initial Development: $60,000
- Annual Hosting: $2,400/yr ($7,200 total)
- Annual Maintenance: $7,400/yr ($22,200 total)
- No licensing fees

**SaaS CMS (e.g., Contentful): $46,800**
- Initial Integration: $12,000
- Annual License: $9,600/yr ($28,800 total)
- Annual Maintenance: $2,000/yr ($6,000 total)

blocks.title: TCO Breakdown Insight
blocks.content: Strapi's self-hosted model eliminates licensing costs while providing full control over data and deployment. The $15K initial development investment is recovered in less than 6 months compared to custom build costs.
Here's how Strapi compares to alternative approaches across key features:

blocks.title: Detailed Feature Comparison Table
blocks.content:
| Feature | Strapi | Custom Build | SaaS CMS |
|---------|--------|--------------|----------|
| **Content Management UI** | ✅ Included (customizable) | ❌ Build from scratch | ⚠️ Limited customization |
| **GraphQL API** | ✅ Auto-generated | ❌ Manual implementation | ✅ Included |
| **REST API** | ✅ Auto-generated | ❌ Manual implementation | ✅ Included |
| **TypeScript Support** | ✅ Full type generation | ✅ Custom types | ⚠️ Limited |
| **Self-Hosted Option** | ✅ Yes | ✅ Yes | ❌ No |
| **Plugin Ecosystem** | ✅ 200+ plugins | ❌ Build everything | ⚠️ Vendor-specific |
| **Customization** | ✅ Full control | ✅ Full control | ❌ Limited |

features.title: Auto-Generated APIs
features.description: GraphQL and REST endpoints automatically generated from content types. No manual API development required.

features.title: Flexible Data Modeling
features.description: Dynamic zones, components, and relations give you WordPress flexibility with enterprise type safety.

features.title: Developer Experience
features.description: TypeScript code generation, hot reload, plugin system, and comprehensive documentation accelerate development.

features.title: Content Team Friendly
features.description: Intuitive admin panel requires minimal training. Content editors are productive from day one.

blocks.content: Strapi provides enterprise-grade security features essential for handling sensitive data:

features.title: Role-Based Access Control
features.description: Granular permissions at content type, field, and API endpoint levels. Define custom roles with precise access policies.

features.title: Data Encryption
features.description: PostgreSQL encryption at rest, TLS/HTTPS in transit, and secure environment variable management.

features.title: Audit Logging
features.description: Track all admin actions, content changes, and API requests for compliance and forensic analysis.

features.title: GDPR Compliance
features.description: Data export, deletion, and privacy features built-in. Self-hosting ensures data sovereignty.

features.title: API Key Management
features.description: Token-based authentication with configurable expiration, scopes, and rate limiting.

features.title: Security Updates
features.description: Active community and Strapi Inc. provide regular security patches and vulnerability disclosure.

blocks.title: Data Sovereignty
blocks.content: Self-hosted Strapi gives you complete control over data location, backup policies, and compliance requirements. Critical for regulated industries (healthcare, finance, legal) and international businesses with data residency requirements.
Strapi excels in these common business scenarios:

features.title: Marketing Websites
features.description: Power multi-page marketing sites with blog, case studies, and landing pages. Enable marketers to launch campaigns independently.

features.title: Service Businesses
features.description: Manage service offerings, testimonials, team profiles, and contact forms. Integrate with CRM and email marketing tools.

features.title: Mobile & Web Apps
features.description: Serve content to React, React Native, Vue, or Next.js frontends via GraphQL or REST. Real-time updates via webhooks.
